scripts.lint:web: corepack pnpm --filter @flowintel/ui lint && corepack pnpm --filter @flowintel/web lint
scripts.typecheck:web: corepack pnpm --filter @flowintel/ui typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @flowintel/web typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm test:web && corepack pnpm go:test
scripts.test:web: corepack pnpm --filter @flowintel/ui test && corepack pnpm --filter @flowintel/web test
scripts.check: corepack pnpm lint:web && corepack pnpm typecheck:web && corepack pnpm test:web && corepack pnpm go:vet && corepack pnpm go:test
scripts.go:vet: for dir in apps/api apps/workers packages/domain packages/config packages/providers packages/db packages/intelligence packages/ops packages/billing; do (cd "$dir" && go vet ./...) || exit 1; done
scripts.go:test: for dir in apps/api apps/workers packages/domain packages/config packages/providers packages/db packages/intelligence packages/ops packages/billing; do (cd "$dir" && go test ./...) || exit 1; done
scripts.go:list: for dir in apps/api apps/workers packages/domain packages/config packages/providers packages/db packages/intelligence packages/ops packages/billing; do (cd "$dir" && go list ./...) || exit 1; done
